params.backendSignature: ECDSA signature from the Rust backend proving CHSH > 2.0
params.chshScore: The CHSH score scaled by 100 (e.g., 201 = 2.01, after Mitiq ZNE mitigation)
params.destToken: Token to release to recipient on this chain

returns._0: transferId Unique identifier for this transfer

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.qkdProof: Proof of QKD key establishment (CHSH violation data)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

executeTransfer(bytes32,address,uint256,.notice: Execute transfer after sufficient proofs and CHSH certification

registerQKDSession(bytes32,bytes).notice: Register a new QKD session key

submitProof(bytes32,bytes,bytes32).notice: Submit validator proof with PQC signature
